text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! It's a chuuurch!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Evacuation to safe zone—successful. We are no
longer at risk from the lightning storm or any
potential landslides.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'm really, really sorry! I'm to blame for all this...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All parties are uninjured. We have successfully
obtained a place for refuge. What seems to be
the problem?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
We were so close to getting injured... All because I
wanted to go on a picnic...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this bento lunch is amazing! Look, it's got
little versions of us running across a field!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be nice if we could be like this, so I
made it in food form.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You're right, look how smiley we are! It's just like
us!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but it's not... The real us aren't in a field, and
we're not having a picnic...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm having tons of fun! I've never had a sleepover in a church before!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Me too. This is making for a very interesting
experience.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If you think today's gone all wrong, we can always
try again.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Cause I wanna hang out with you looots and lots,
Rice!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
In the spring, we can go see the cherry blossoms
bloom!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And in the summer, we can go swimming in the
ocean!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
May we also go out to observe the autumn
foliage together? There is a mission I'm interested
in—"Sweet Potato Baking."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If we fail, we can always try again. We can also
pray to the Three Goddesses if you are nervous.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I will accompany you whatever the cause. After
all, I'm your friend.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That goes for me too! We'll have fun over and
over again, 'cause I'll aaalways be your friend!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara... Bourbon...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Will you make snowmen with me in the winter?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Do you really want to be around... me?

text_block_list.name: Urara & Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much... I promise...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We'll stay friends...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Forever.
